per_page.description: Maximum number of items to be returned in result set.

start_date.description: Limit events to those starting after the specified date.

end_date.description: Limit events to those ending before the specified date.

search.description: Limit results to those matching a string.

categories.description: Limit result set to events assigned specific categories.

tags.description: Limit result set to events assigned specific tags.

venue.description: Limit result set to events assigned to specific venues.

organizer.description: Limit result set to events assigned to specific organizers.

featured.description: Limit result set to featured events only.

status.description: Limit result set to events with specific status.

post_parent.description: Limit result set to events with specific post parent.

starts_before.description: Limit result set to events starting before the specified date.

starts_after.description: Limit result set to events starting after the specified date.

ends_before.description: Limit result set to events ending before the specified date.

ends_after.description: Limit result set to events ending after the specified date.

ticketed.description: Limit result set to events with tickets.

order.description: Order sort attribute ascending or descending.

date.description: The date the entity was published, in the site's timezone. In RFC3339 format.

date_gmt.description: The date the entity was published, as GMT. In RFC3339 format.

slug.description: An alphanumeric identifier for the entity unique to its type

status.description: A named status for the entity.

title.description: HTML title for the entity, transformed for display

content.description: HTML content for the entity, transformed for display

excerpt.description: HTML excerpt for the entity, transformed for display

author.description: The ID for the author of the entity.

featured_media.description: The ID of the featured media for the entity.

comment_status.description: Whether or not comments are open on the entity.

ping_status.description: Whether or not the entity can be pinged

template.description: The theme file to use to display the entity.

tags.description: The terms assigned to the entity in the post_tag taxonomy

tribe_events_cat.description: The terms assigned to the entity in the tribe_events_cat taxonomy

start_date.description: The start date of the event

start_date_utc.description: The start date of the event in UTC

end_date.description: The end date of the event

end_date_utc.description: The end date of the event in UTC

duration.description: The duration of the event in seconds

all_day.description: Whether the event is all day
